models.title: Models
models.directoryPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default location
models.directorySaved: Saved — restart the app to use the new directory.

datasets.title: Datasets
datasets.directoryPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default location
datasets.directoryHint: Holds downloaded archives before they're ingested. Separate from where ingested data lives. Changes apply on next launch.
datasets.directorySaved: Saved — restart the app to use the new directory.
datasets.keepRawDownloadsHint: After a dataset finishes ingesting, the downloaded archives can be deleted to reclaim space — the ingested data remains usable on its own.

chat.title: Chat
chat.llmHint: Restart the app for the change to apply.

columnModes.title: Results display
columnModes.description: Default display mode for each cell kind in the results pane. The column header chip overrides these per-column.
